components.name: doubleword
components.description: Doubleword for opencode: realtime + flex (async) providers, small_model pin, async MCP tool, and a flex background subagent. Requires DOUBLEWORD_API_KEY in your environment.

components.name: doubleword-async-tool
components.description: MCP tool set 'doubleword_async' — primary blocking tool returns flex completions directly; fallback pair (submit_async_job + get_async_result) for explicit non-blocking use when the user chooses to wait and check later.

components.name: doubleword-flex-agent
components.description: Subagent 'dw-flex' pinned to Doubleword's flex tier — for non-urgent, self-contained work dispatched in the background.
